name: Gifted Children: Mother IQ vs Score
description: Mothers IQ vs childs analytical aptitude score for 36 gifted children.
studyDescription: Data on 36 children who qualified for a gifted and talented program in a large city school district. Researchers recorded each child's analytical aptitude test score and their mother's IQ as part of an observational study of factors associated with giftedness.

variableDescriptions.motheriq: IQ score of the child's mother
variableDescriptions.score: Child's score on a standardized analytical aptitude test

sourceDetail: OpenIntro, openintro::gifted. Original study from Graybill, F.A. and Iyer, H.K. (1994). Regression Analysis: Concepts and Applications. Duxbury Press.

context.parameter: slope of aptitude on mother IQ
